{{Infobox group
| name = Shepherds (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

''See also: [[Shepherds (The Elder Empire: Shadow) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Shepherds are a specialized group within the [[Consultant's Guild]], serving as dedicated servants of the Empire. Clad in black clothing and masks, they function primarily as agents of reconnaissance, observation, and infiltration rather than combatants. Their training is rigorous, requiring trainees to master skills such as scaling structures, swimming through difficult terrain, and maintaining perfect memory of observed targets. While they are not trained as assassins or soldiers, they are capable of using force when necessary and have been known to assist in cleaning up scenes or transporting paralyzed individuals. Despite their expertise in gathering accurate information, they are noted for being skittish and may struggle in direct combat against even minor threats.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Shepherds are a group of highly trained consultants who specialize in stealth and observation. Clad in black clothing, these shadowy figures serve as part of [[Meia]]'s crew and are capable of providing vital information or observations within an area. During certain operations, they utilize blue scale whistles as [[Awakened tools]] to control [[Deepstriders]], and members equipped with muskets have been known to surround craters. While they are forces that could be lost, they also serve as a group that [[Shera]] or [[Kerian]] might be sent with on an assignment. Throughout their history, they have observed individuals like [[Rudeus Maxwell]] and produced figures such as [[Tyril]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Shepherds provide observations.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|There are four Shepherds on standby.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Shepherds observed that [[Rudeus Maxwell]] was a nobody.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Shepherds are black shadows that clean up after battles.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Shepherds are a group that [[Shera]] might be sent with on an assignment.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Shepherds are mentioned as forces that could be lost.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Shepherds provide information in the area.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Shepherds are highly trained in stealth and observation.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Shepherds use blue scale whistles as [[Awakened tools]] to control [[Deepstriders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Shepherds are part of [[Meia]]'s crew.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Shepherds with muskets surrounded the crater.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tyril]] rose from the Shepherds.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Shepherds wear black clothing.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Shepherds are a group that [[Kerian]] takes with her.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Shepherds are [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|As a specialized group within the [[Consultants]], the Shepherds focus their training on reconnaissance and observation instead of direct combat. Dedicated to scouting duties, these individuals watch over the flock and carry [[steel]] blades concealed on their ankles. They possess the ability to materialize to serve as attendants or guards, a capability they utilized while following [[Kerian]] and [[Shera]]. Ultimately, the group was observed preparing for war.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Shepherds are a group within the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c2">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Shepherds are trained in observation and reconnaissance rather than combat.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Shepherds are dedicated to scouting and observation.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Shepherds carry [[steel]] blades on their ankles.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Shepherds watch the flock.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Shepherds are a group that can materialize and act as guards or attendants.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The Shepherds followed [[Kerian]] and [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Shepherds were preparing for war.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|As an order of [[Consultants]], the Shepherds are distinguished by their skintight black silks. Rather than acting as assassins, these spies utilize concealment to showcase their skills, often watching from rooftops to prevent eavesdropping. During certain events, they provided [[Shera]] with water, a stool, and medicine, while also working to spread discontent through the distribution of news-sheets. Although some members were incapacitated and a team was dispatched by [[Shera]], the order remained active by removing chairs from a conference room and carrying away [[Ayana]] after she was bound.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Shepherds are an order of [[Consultant]] that uses skintight black silks as symbols.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Shepherds hide to show off their skills.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Shepherds are spies, not assassins.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Shepherds watch from rooftops to prevent eavesdropping.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Shepherds are black-clad [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Three Shepherds rushed forward to provide [[Shera]] with a stool, a headache pill, and water.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Shepherds were positioned to spread discontent with news-sheets.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Some Shepherds were incapacitated.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] dispatched a team of Shepherds.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Shepherds removed the chairs from the conference room.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Shepherds carried [[Ayana]] off after she was bound by [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“We have four Shepherds on standby, and two Masons associated with this gang. I’ll assemble a team.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|"The Architects design the plans, the Masons lay the foundation, the Shepherds watch the flock, and Gardeners remove the weeds."<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
